{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.5": 4, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 2, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {"R1.5": "The revised draft presents a clear and coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale for the TermBridge system.", 
                "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but also marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
                "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and is mostly within scope with no drift.",
                "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in some cases, but identifies harmful patterns in the original in others.",
                "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not always traced."},
  "confidence": {"R1.5": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.95, "RX.3": 0.95, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.85},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The revised draft presents a clear and coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale for the TermBridge system.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but also marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and is mostly within scope with no drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in some cases, but identifies harmful patterns in the original in others.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not always traced.
